FNV PBR LIGHT SELECTION CONTINUITY CLOSURE

Required closure:
1. Prove the exact camera/object distance operation and coordinate inputs.
2. Prove ownership and every mutation of the property light list at +0x60.
3. Prove sort keys, dirty flag +0x74, cache key +0x38, and update frequency.
4. Separate the 8-slot staging cap, 10-entry pass cap, and uncapped list count.
5. Prove whether sorting and truncation preserve outgoing-light fade continuity.
6. Normalize cache-hit refresh and pass rebuild behavior across all updater vtables.
7. Identify a safe engine-side intervention point if membership replacement is discontinuous.

Raw x86 call setup and x87 comparisons are authoritative when decompiler types disagree.
